entries.source: "Explain derivatives step by step"
entries.value: "Forklar afledte funktioner trin for trin"

entries.source: "Help with quadratic equations"
entries.value: "Hjælp med andengradsligninger"

entries.source: "Solve 2x + 5 = 17 with me"
entries.value: "Løs 2x + 5 = 17 sammen med mig"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Math Step Coach on inspir for stem learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: En praktisk guide til at bruge Matematik-trincoach på inspir til STEM læring, med prompter, studieloops og sikrere AI-vaner.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: En stærkere studieloop

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI-vejleder

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Be om et lille første trin i stilet for et endeligt svar.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Be AI’en kontroller dit ræsonnement, ikke bara resultatet.

entries.source: Check each step.
entries.value: Kontrollera hver trin.

entries.source: Choose a first move.
entries.value: Vælj et første trin.

entries.source: Explain why the method works.
entries.value: Forklar hvorfor metoden virker.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Afslut gennem at skrive tilbage idéen fra hukommelsen.

entries.source: Learners who want to see why each math step works, not just copy an answer.
entries.value: Elever, der ønsker at se, hvorfor hvert matematikmatisk trin virker, frem for bare at kopiere et svar.

entries.source: Math Step Coach
entries.value: Matematik-coach

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.
entries.value: Matematik-trincoach til at løse opgaver med førståelse er en fokuseret måde at bruge AI til læring på i stedet for passiv indsamling af svar. Tilstanden er bygget omkring en bestemt opgave: Løs matematikmatik ved at førstå hvert trin. Din coach tjekker dit arbejde, peger på smuttere og opbygger selvtillid.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: Matematik-trincoach for førstatelse: praktisk vejledning

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompter at prøve

entries.source: Start the live mode at Math Step Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Science Lab Partner. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Start live-tilstanden ved Matematik-trincoach. Hvis du vil have et nærliggende læringsformat, kan du prøve Laboratoriemakker i naturfag. For et bredere blik på platformen kan du læse, hvad en AI-læringsmakker bør gøre for alle.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Tell tilstand hvad du er prøver at lær eller produsere.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: That difference viser up in flow. Instead of ett giant response, beste sessioner gat gennem en loop: set en matl, prøv noe, get tilbakemelding, reparer svag spot, og velg næste action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: That focus matematikmatikrs. En general chatbot kan svar almost anything, but en læringstilstand gives samtale en shape. Det nudges du toward typen thinAIng, øvelse, tilbakemelding, eller exploration som hjælper idé stick.

entries.source: The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: Forløbet tjekker hvert trin, påpeger fejl og forbinder fremgangsmåder med selve konceptet.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: This er samme habit behind studying med AI uden cheating dig selv: hold elev active. AI er most nyttig natr det gives du tilbakemelding on din thinAIng.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Denne tilstanden er spesielt nyttig for elever som vil:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Prøv trinet med egne ord.

entries.source: Use Math Step Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Brug Matematik-trincoach, når du vil have en session, der starter hurtigt, men stadig tilpasser sig dig. Det første mål er ikke at lyde imponerende. Det første mål er at få næste skridt til at føles muligt.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Hvad denne tilstanden hjælper med

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Hvor du gatr videre

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Du kan also start med en rough version of din ekte problem. En messy første prompt er fine. session kan clarify nivat, matlgruppe, frist, og style once du begin.
